sector_theme.zh: 半导体设备 · CMP 国产垄断 · HBM 减薄第二引擎
sector_theme.en: Semiconductor equipment · domestic CMP monopoly · HBM thinning second engine

provenance.research_core_lineage: CTF batch-1 ticker #2 — discovered via Serenity Scan #1 (docs/research/serenity/SCAN_1_AI_SEMIS.md, #68 merged; serenity_score 74 = T2 [unvalidated intuition]); nominations ratified by Junyan 2026-06-11
provenance.generation_note: fresh-generation path per CTF spec §4 + #67: production api/research 8-step thesis generated 2026-06-11 (auto _quality 90 = FLOOR only; committed at cores/api_generated/688120_SH_20260611.json), then FACT-CHECKED against a dedicated web fact pack (E1-pinned to 年报/一季报/公告/IR记录 PDF). Material api errors corrected by the factcheck: GM stated 44.5% (actual 41.81% E1); an UNDISCLOSED 'order book ¥8.3B' invented (no order-book number exists in any filing); consumables-attach framing partially misassigned (耗材/维保 exists but pad/slurry are 鼎龙/安集's business). Finding logged: api/research on out-of-watchlist names produces fluent but numerically wrong theses — auto-score ≠ factual quality; the data-layer gap closes via the watchlist extension in this PR
provenance.factcheck_basis: two-agent web fact pack 2026-06-11: price/valuation from exchange feed (E1 行情); FY25/Q1 absolutes from 年报/一季报 PDF + IR记录 2026-04-24 原文 (E1); consensus from 国盛 4/23 / 东海 5/8 (E2 卖方)

variant_perception.zh: 市场相信:存储超级周期 + 长鑫过会让国产设备订单'确定性爆发',因此一个月内(5/08→6/11)在零新增基本面披露下把市值推高 33% 至 924 亿(静态 PE 85×)。我们相信:垄断卡位是真的(国内唯一 12 寸 CMP 量产商,累计出机 1000+ 台 E2;减薄抛光一体机累计 20+ 台、部分先进制程 CMP 已进头部存储厂 HBM 产线作基线设备,E1 公司主张),但三个被主题行情掩盖的事实是——(a) 公司自己的激励草案隐含 2026 归母净利底线仅 ≈10.9 亿(≈与 2025 持平),与卖方 26E 13.9-14.2 亿之间有 +28% 缺口;(b) 毛利率三连降(FY25 41.81%,-1.39pp)+ 净利增速(+5.9%)远落后营收(+36.5%)的剪刀差;(c) 经营现金流连续恶化(FY25 -30.7%,Q1 -38.9%)。当前价格是为'订单兑现的最乐观路径'付费;分辨事件 = 2026 半年报的收入/毛利率/扣非打印。
variant_perception.en: Market believes: the storage super-cycle + CXMT's IPO approval make domestic-equipment orders a 'certainty', so it repriced the name +33% in one month (5/08→6/11) to ¥92.4B (85x static PE) on ZERO new fundamental disclosure. We believe: the monopoly position is real (sole domestic 12" CMP maker, 1000+ cumulative tools E2; 20+ thinning-polishing integrated tools and CMP units installed as BASELINE equipment on a leading memory maker's HBM line, E1 company claims), but three facts buried under the theme rally are — (a) the company's own incentive draft implies a 2026 net-profit floor of only ≈¥1.09B (≈flat vs 2025), a +28% gap below sell-side FY26E ¥1.39-1.42B; (b) three consecutive years of GM decline (FY25 41.81%, −1.39pp) with profit growth (+5.9%) far behind revenue (+36.5%); (c) deteriorating operating cash flow (FY25 −30.7%, Q1 −38.9%). The current price pays for the most optimistic order-conversion path; the discriminating event is the 2026 H1 report's revenue/GM/non-GAAP print.

mechanism.zh: 第一性链条:存储/逻辑扩产(长存三期装机、长鑫过会后扩产)→ 每条 12 寸线必配 CMP(多重曝光与 HBM 堆叠使步数倍增)→ 国内唯一量产商承接制度性锁定的需求(同业实体清单背景)→ 订单→收入转化在半年报打印 → 若收入增速 ≥30% 且毛利率守住 40%±,'垄断+第二引擎(减薄/离子注入/晶圆再生)'叙事获得 E1 支撑,利润缺口向卖方数字收敛;反之激励底线情形兑现,85× 静态估值失去支撑。诚实锚:公司拒绝披露存储/逻辑客户拆分('占比较大'是全部口径),订单无量化指引('在手订单充足'),所以本论点不依赖任何订单数字——只依赖将在半年报强制披露的收入/毛利率/扣非。
mechanism.en: First-principles chain: storage/logic capex (YMTC phase-3 install, CXMT post-approval expansion) → every 12" line must run CMP (multi-patterning and HBM stacking multiply step counts) → the sole domestic production-grade maker absorbs institutionally locked-in demand (peers entity-listed) → order-to-revenue conversion prints at the H1 report → if revenue grows ≥30% with GM holding ~40%, the 'monopoly + second engines (thinning / ion implant / wafer regen)' narrative gains E1 support and the profit gap converges toward sell-side numbers; otherwise the incentive-floor case materializes and the 85x static multiple loses support. Honesty anchor: the company refuses customer-mix splits ('较大' is the entire register) and gives no quantified order guidance ('充足') — so this thesis depends on NO order number, only on the H1-mandated revenue/GM/non-GAAP prints.

thesis.horizon: 6-12 months (E1 proof event = 2026 H1 report ~2026-08-2x; secondary checkpoints quarterly)
thesis.conviction: WATCH_ONLY — R/R at the 2026-06-11 live price (≈0.43) is FAR below the 2:1 bar and even the committed split-adjusted reference (≈1.98) misses it; STARTER eligibility begins only at the add zone (≤~139, where the bar is met) or on a post-E1 re-band. No position at current price.

items.claim: FY2025: revenue ¥4.648B +36.46%, 归母 ¥1.084B +5.89%, 扣非 ¥0.965B +12.69%, GM 41.81% (−1.39pp, third consecutive decline), OCF ¥0.80B −30.73%; 26Q1: revenue ¥1.201B +31.66%, 归母 ¥0.247B +5.95%, GM 42.31%, OCF ¥7.89M −38.91% — the revenue/profit scissors is the central tension
items.source: 2025年报 PDF (sina 12154282) + 2026一季报 PDF (sina 12154262) + IR记录 2026-04-24 原文 (cninfo b29d0c09); GM/OCF via two consistent media transcriptions of the filings

items.claim: Incentive draft implies a 2026 net-profit FLOOR of ≈¥1.09B (EPS ≥4.60 on the 236,724,893 pre-issue share base) — ≈FLAT vs 2025, a +28% gap below sell-side FY26E ¥1.386-1.415B; the company's own bar does not promise the growth the market is paying for
items.source: 激励计划草案摘要 (公告 2026-018, sina 12095148) [底线为 derived: 236.7M × 4.60 ≈ ¥1.089B]; 国盛 4/23 (FY26E 13.86亿, cut from 15.25亿) + 东海 5/8 (14.15亿) — both sell-side numbers CUT post-annual-report

items.claim: Second engines are E1-claimed but early: 减薄抛光一体机 cumulative 20+ units with repeat orders from multiple leading houses (correct register: 一体机, NOT bare 减薄机); 部分先进制程 CMP 装备已进入头部存储厂商 HBM 产线作为基线设备; 12" high-current ion implanter batch-delivered; wafer-regen Tianjin 200k wpm full
items.source: IR记录 2026-04-24 原文 (company claims; no third-party verification; 'HBM 基线设备' has no revenue split attached) — the cadence of these units through 2026 is the under-modeled variable

items.claim: Cumulative 1000+ CMP tools shipped (1000th unit ceremony 2026-04-08); orders qualitative only: '部分核心客户提前锁定产能/在手订单充足' — the company REFUSES customer-mix splits and gives NO quantified order guidance; media claims of an 'order-guidance raise' are lead-grade with no filing
items.source: 新浪科技/证券时报 2026-04-08 (第1000台出机, E2 转述) + 财联社 2026-01-29 (董秘办口径) + IR记录 4/24 ('存储及逻辑订单占比较大', refusal to split)

items.claim: Theme repricing without new fundamentals: 5/08 ¥69.3B → 5/20 peak (intraday ATH 5/21) → 6/11 ¥92.4B (+33%), driven by storage-super-cycle/CXMT-approval headlines; static PE 85.25x, TTM 84.17x, PB 12.19; 155 institutions at the FY25 results call (UBS/BlackRock/GS Asia) — the name is HEAVILY covered and theme-crowded
items.source: exchange feed 2026-06-11 (qt.gtimg.cn, E1 行情) + 腾讯K线 + IR记录参会名单 (E1) + 金融界/新浪 theme attribution (E2) — tracked as crowding, not support

items.claim: ≤¥4.0B A-share placement (定增) passed the AGM 5/13, plan revised 5/28, awaiting SSE review — ~4.3% dilution at current market cap; proceeds fund Shanghai equipment base / Kunshan wafer-regen / R&D
items.source: 预案公告 2026-025 (4/22) + 股东会决议 5/14 + 修订稿提示性公告 5/29 (cnstock)

rule_x_check.why: The forward mechanism (order→revenue conversion + GM hold) is re-confirmable by issuer disclosure: the 2026 H1 report MUST print revenue, GM, 扣非 and OCF — no channel checks or undisclosed metrics required. The order-mix sub-leg is explicitly NOT load-bearing because the company refuses to disclose it (handled via if_not_disclosed). This satisfies the 2026-05-17 Rule-X boundary: same mechanism, issuer-disclosure-confirmable.

evidence.contrarian_view: Bears: (1) the GM three-year slide + profit/revenue scissors say pricing power is ALREADY eroding as the product mix shifts to market-development-stage units — monopoly ≠ margin; (2) OCF deterioration (FY25 −31%, Q1 −39%) plus a delayed 募投 project (2/14 公告) signal working-capital strain under the order ramp; (3) the company's own incentive floor (≈flat 2026) is the single most informed forecast in the file and it contradicts the +28% sell-side consensus; (4) 85x static / 93x dynamic-annualized PE prices in FY27 already — equipment names历史上 in down-cycles de-rate to 30-45x, and 2026 storage capex is the cycle TOP narrative; (5) ~4.3% placement dilution ahead; (6) the 5/12→5/20 +52% melt-up then −12% retrace shows the marginal buyer is theme money, not fundamental money.

event.zh: 2026 半年报(收入/毛利率/扣非/OCF = E1 证明事件)
event.en: 2026 H1 report (revenue/GM/non-GAAP/OCF = the E1 proof event)

catalyst_calendar.watch: 营收同比、毛利率、扣非同比、经营现金流;若披露:新签/在手订单、减薄一体机出机数
catalyst_calendar.expected: rev YoY ≥+30% & GM ≥40% supports the conversion narrative; rev <+20% or GM <38% fires wrong_if

event.zh: 定增审核节点(上交所受理/问询/注册)

catalyst_calendar.watch: 受理与问询进度、最终规模
catalyst_calendar.expected: smooth review = neutral; termination or >50% downsize = capital-plan break (watch-grade, not wrong_if)

event.zh: 临时股东会(薪酬制度;激励计划推进节奏观察)

catalyst_calendar.watch: 激励计划是否随后上会(其 4.60 EPS 底线是本论点的关键锚)
catalyst_calendar.expected: incentive finalization locks the floor anchor

event.zh: 长鑫 IPO 上市与扩产新闻流(主题 beta,双刃)
event.en: CXMT IPO listing + expansion newsflow (theme beta, double-edged)

catalyst_calendar.watch: 上市定价、扩产节奏的公告级信号
catalyst_calendar.expected: supportive headlines sustain the multiple; theme cooling de-rates it regardless of fundamentals — CROWDING-flagged, not load-bearing

triggers.source: 2026 半年报 合并利润表

triggers.metric: 2026 H1 扣非归母净利同比 (non-GAAP net profit YoY)
triggers.source: 2026 半年报 合并利润表

triggers.metric: 新签/在手订单同比 (new/backlog orders YoY)
triggers.threshold: < +15% (if_not_disclosed: 半年报与业绩说明会均无订单口径 → 记 INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE,不猜测)
triggers.source: 2026 半年报 + 半年度业绩说明会 IR 记录

note.zh: 前三条全部绑定半年报强制披露科目(公司无法不披露);第四条按 if_not_disclosed 协议处理——公司拒绝拆分客户结构的前科已记录。任一触发即复核论点;触发后未更新决策书记为诚实性失败。
note.en: First three bind to MANDATORY H1 line items (the company cannot withhold them); the fourth follows the if_not_disclosed protocol — the company's refusal to split customer mix is on record. Any trigger forces a thesis review; an un-updated sheet after a trigger is an honesty failure.

valuation_target_range.basis: net-profit path × PE scenarios ÷ 494,731,127 post-split shares (E1: 权益分派实施公告). Anchors: incentive floor ≈¥1.09B [E1-derived]; sell-side FY26E ¥1.386-1.415B / FY27E ¥1.845-1.871B (国盛/东海, both cut post-annual-report, E2). Automated valuation stack NOT yet run for this name (watchlist-driven; fetch lands after this PR) — band is analyst-constructed; every multiple is [unvalidated intuition] with stated anchors. All per-share figures POST-split (6/10 10转4派4).

assumptions: 2026 lands at the incentive floor: NP ¥10.9-11.2B范围内取 ≈¥1.10B (flat) — the company's own bar
GM slide continues (<40%), OCF stays weak; storage-theme money exits
de-rated monopoly-equipment PE 40-46x [unvalidated intuition; cycle-trough for a sole-source name, above generic industrials]
H1 prints rev ≥+30% / GM ≈40-42%; FY26 NP lands slightly under consensus at ≈¥1.35B (consensus 1.386-1.415B haircut for the scissors history)
PE 57-64x [unvalidated intuition; monopoly + visible storage capex, below today's 85x]
storage capex super-cycle converts on schedule AND second engines (thinning integrated tools / ion implant / wafer regen) contribute visibly; FY27E ¥1.85B effectively prints early
market holds a growth multiple ~59-62x [unvalidated intuition]

valuation_target_range.sensitivity_note: every scenario = (profit path × PE) ÷ the FIXED post-split 494.7M share count (placement dilution ~4.3% NOT yet in the math — would shave each band ~4%); ±5x of PE moves bands ~8-9%; the profit path is the thesis-loaded variable and resolves at the H1 print

summary.zh: 两个口径的 R/R 都不达标:按 6/11 实价 186.74(E2 行情,换算后),R/R≈0.43——一个月 +33% 的主题行情已把入场数学打坏;按提交快照(5/08 经 6/10 除权调整后 139.67),R/R≈1.98 也仍略低于 2:1。结论:当前不允许任何仓位(连 STARTER 也不允许),这与 Scan #1 的'结构紧张真实、入场定价不优'判断一致。两条路径重新进入:(a) 价格回落至 ≤139 一线(bar 价 139.33,巧合地 ≈5/08 水平——即把主题涨幅全部回吐);(b) 2026-08 半年报 E1 兑现(rev ≥+30%、GM ≥40%)后用打印数字重算区间,bear 下沿抬升会在更高价位满足 2:1。任何执行前必须取实时价;human_executes——系统只建议、不下单。
summary.en: BOTH references fail the bar: at the 6/11 live price 186.74 (E2 feed) R/R ≈0.43 — the one-month +33% theme rally broke the entry math; at the committed snapshot (5/08, split-adjusted to 139.67) R/R ≈1.98, still under 2:1. Conclusion: NO position at current price (not even STARTER) — consistent with Scan #1's 'tightness real, entry pricing not disconnected'. Two re-entry paths: (a) pullback to ≤~139 (bar price 139.33 — coincidentally ≈the 5/08 level, i.e. a full give-back of the theme rally); (b) the 2026-08 H1 E1 print (rev ≥+30%, GM ≥40%) re-bases the bear floor — re-run the band on printed numbers. Pull a live quote before ANY execution; human_executes — the system suggests, never trades.

execution_plan.entry: committed reference 139.67 (universe_a 5/08 snapshot, corporate-action adjusted; live 186.74 on 2026-06-11 E2); NO entry at current — add zone = ≤139.33 (bar met) OR post-E1 re-band
execution_plan.staging: WATCH now (no position) → STARTER only inside the add zone or after the H1 E1 print re-band → conviction requires R/R ≥2:1 on the re-based band; never average into a fired wrong_if
execution_plan.invalidation: price: n/a while flat (no position to invalidate); thesis: any mechanized wrong_if trigger kills the thesis and the name reverts to pool-watch
execution_plan.sizing_suggestion: tier: NONE at reference (WATCH_ONLY); STARTER_CAPPED inside the add zone [suggestion only — human_executes; the system never auto-trades or sizes]
execution_plan.holding_horizon: 6-12 months from first entry (if ever); thesis resolves at the 2026-08 H1 print and quarterly thereafter
review_dates: 2026-07-11 (30d: 定增进度 + 激励上会节奏 + 池内增量)

serenity.theme_system_change: A股 AI 半导体(Scan #1 #68):国产算力 capex 政策性放大(国家级 AI 算力网络计划草案要求 ≥80% 国产芯片)× HBM/存储产能为最紧物理瓶颈 × 同业实体清单使国产设备需求被制度性锁定
value_chain_map: L1 薄膜沉积+混合键合(最紧)
L2 HBM后段三件套+存储封测闸门(本票:减薄)
L3 CMP全链 设备+垫+液(本票:设备,垄断结构最清晰)
L4 内存接口(认证型寡头)
L9 算力芯片设计(非瓶颈,降级)
serenity.scarce_layer: L2/L3 — 每条 12 寸线必配 CMP(国内唯一量产商);HBM ≤50μm 减薄是堆叠前置工序(一体机累计仅 20+ 台 = 供给刚起步)

bottleneck_evidence.claim: 国内唯一 12 寸 CMP 量产商;累计出机 1000+ 台(第 1000 台 2026-04-08 出机)
bottleneck_evidence.source: 新浪/证券时报 2026-04-08 转述 + 东海研报

bottleneck_evidence.claim: 减薄抛光一体机累计出货 20+ 台、多家头部企业重复订单;部分先进制程 CMP 进入头部存储厂 HBM 产线作基线设备
bottleneck_evidence.source: IR记录 2026-04-24 原文(公司主张,无第三方核验)

bottleneck_evidence.claim: 拓荆/北方华创/盛美列美实体清单 → 长鑫级新厂设备采购被制度性导向国产(华海自身未列清单 = 既受益于锁定又保留海外零部件通道)
bottleneck_evidence.source: 证券时报 2024-12 实体清单名单(政策事件)

serenity.market_may_be_missing: 诚实结论:市场没漏多少——+33%/月、155 家机构参会、85× 静态说明发现已完成。真正的边际分辨点是【激励底线 ≈10.9 亿(持平) vs 卖方 26E 13.9-14.2 亿】这 28% 缺口将在半年报收敛方向;以及减薄一体机从 20 台基数的放量节奏(市场当作期权定价,半年报出机数披露会给出第一个可证伪读数)
serenity.substitution_route: 海外(AMAT/Ebara)在管制放松情形下回流;国产二供(中电科 45 所等)技术代差仍大(弱);客户自建产能不可行 — 替代路径短期(6-12mo)不构成威胁,长期看管制政策
serenity.expansion_difficulty: 设备验证周期 1-2 年 + 产线绑定(基线设备替换成本高);公司自身产能扩张依赖上海基地定增落地(~4.3% 摊薄的对价)
serenity.customer_validation: 头部存储厂 HBM 产线基线设备(E1 公司主张);存储+逻辑订单'占比较大'(公司拒绝拆分,口径诚实记录);155 家机构调研含 UBS/贝莱德/高盛亚洲(E1 参会名单)

what_weakens_the_view.metric: 2026H1 CMP+减薄新签订单同比(若披露)
what_weakens_the_view.source: 2026 半年报 + 业绩说明会 IR 记录

what_weakens_the_view.metric: 2026 全年减薄抛光一体机累计出机
what_weakens_the_view.threshold: ≤ 35 台(年初 20+ 基数上未放量)
what_weakens_the_view.source: 公司 IR 记录/年报披露的累计口径

what_weakens_the_view.threshold: > 8% 股本且订单证据未同步上修

risk.fundamental: GM 三连降 + 利润/营收剪刀差说明新机型仍在'市场开拓阶段毛利率较低'(公司原话)——订单放量与毛利率修复可能不同步;OCF 恶化(Q1 仅 789 万)在扩产备货周期里可能进一步承压;2027 年扩产潮后的订单空窗是设备股的结构性周期风险
risk.policy: 美对零部件/子系统管制升级会抬高 BOM 与交付风险(公司未列实体清单,进口通道现存但政策可变);国产化补贴/大基金节奏变化影响下游扩产时点
risk.valuation: 85× 静态 / 93× 动态年化已把 FY27 计入;若 H1 打印靠近激励底线,E(下修)与 PE(去主题化)双杀——bear 区间 90-102 即该情形的诚实下界;~4.3% 定增摊薄未含在区间数学内
risk.liquidity: 科创板,流通盘相对小 + 主题资金主导边际定价(5/12 单日 +13.7%、5/21 振幅 11.8%)→ 双向波动放大;东方证券 5/19 起做市略有缓冲
risk.crowding_reflexivity: 本票即 Scan #1 拥挤判断的实例:一个月 +33% 无新基本面、设备 ETF 权重、155 家机构覆盖 → '存储超级周期'叙事一旦降温,估值去主题化先于基本面证伪;sentiment feeds 仍 stubbed,拥挤监控部分盲区由行情/两融/调研记录代理 [data break]
